quotes.text: The hardest part of building a business isn't the technology. It's the selling. Most engineers would rather write code than talk to humans.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best validation is someone giving you money. Everything else — surveys, waitlists, likes — is just flirting.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Content marketing is just storytelling for people who are afraid to ask for the sale.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Selling is just helping people make decisions they already want to make.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The hardest part of business isn't building the product. It's getting people to pay for it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Sales is just helping people make decisions they already want to make. The best salespeople know this.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best sales pitch is a product demo that sells itself.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to close a deal is to understand the customer's problem better than they do.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your sales process should be like your product: simple, clear, and focused on the user.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your sales team should be as good at listening as they are at talking. Better, actually.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your blog is your best salesperson. It works 24/7, never complains, and never asks for a raise.
quotes.author: based
